metadata.title: Zeit | Connecting your business at the right time
metadata.description: Telecommunications and fiber optic solutions for businesses and events. High-performance B2B connectivity.
metadata.ogTitle: Zeit | Connecting your business at the right time
metadata.ogDescription: Telecommunications and fiber optic solutions for businesses and events.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: High-performance enterprise connectivity with dedicated fiber optics.

items.title: Dedicated Internet
items.description: Dedicated link with symmetric bandwidth guarantee, 99.5% SLA, and 24/7 support for operations that can't stop.

items.title: Data Center & Colocation
items.description: Tier III infrastructure with full redundancy, continuous monitoring, and low-latency connectivity for your servers.

items.title: Point-to-Point Fiber
items.description: Direct connection between branches with exclusive fiber, ultra-low latency, and total security for corporate data traffic.

items.title: Managed Firewall
items.description: Advanced perimeter protection with complete management, real-time threat monitoring, and customized policies.

about.label: About us
about.title: Connectivity that
about.description1: Zeit is a telecommunications operator specialized in high-performance corporate solutions. With our own fiber optic infrastructure, we deliver dedicated, secure, and scalable connectivity for businesses that can't afford downtime.
about.description2: Our mission is to be the invisible backbone that supports our clients' digital transformation with ultra-low latency, full redundancy, and technical support that understands the criticality of your business.

infrastructure.title: INFRASTRUCTURE
infrastructure.description: Own fiber optic network with redundancy and high availability.
